title: Some users may see delays when accessing Microsoft 365 Copilot Suggested Notebooks
impact: Users may have seen delays when accessing Copilot Suggested Notebooks.

updates.content:
Title: We're looking into a potential problem impacting Microsoft 365 Copilot

User impact: We're checking for potential impact to your users.

Current status: We're investigating a potential issue impacting Copilot and checking for impact to your organization. We'll provide an update within 30 minutes.

Title: Some users may see delays when accessing Microsoft 365 Copilot Suggested Notebooks

User impact: Users may have seen delays when accessing Copilot Suggested Notebooks.

Final status: While we were in the process of analyzing the Copilot infrastructure, our system monitoring indicated that the service had returned to normal health. We've confirmed that the issue is no longer occurring and we'll continue to monitor the service to ensure that the problem doesn't happen again.
 
Scope of impact: Some users accessing Copilot Suggested Notebooks may have been affected by this issue.
 
Start time: Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 9:56 PM UTC
 
End time: Tuesday, April 14, 2026, at 10:41 PM UTC
 
Root cause: An unusually large increase in requests to a portion of infrastructure that facilitates Copilot Suggested Notebook access inhibited the rate in which users' requests were being processed, leading to impact.
 
Next steps: 
 
- We’re analyzing performance data associated with the impacted Copilot Suggested Notebook infrastructure so that we can better understand why traffic wasn’t processing efficiently to help prevent similar impact in the future.
 
This is the final update for the event.
